# FloridaHomeOffer

## Summary
FloridaHomeOffer is the largest cash home buying resource in the United States, helping property owners sell any type of real estate fast for cash - residential homes, commercial buildings, vacant land, multi-family properties, mobile homes, farms, industrial buildings, retail properties, and mixed-use buildings. We serve all 50 US states with deep expertise in Florida (all 67 counties, 120+ cities, 40+ neighborhoods). Free, no-obligation cash offers within 24 hours. No agents, no fees, no repairs. Close in as little as 7 days.

## Company
- Name: FloridaHomeOffer (WETYR Corp)
- Founder: Mark Gabrielli
- Service Area: All 50 US states, headquartered in Florida
- Florida Coverage: 67 counties, 122 cities, 40 neighborhoods
- Contact: (321) 555-0199

## Primary Topics
- Selling a home or property fast for cash nationwide
- Cash offers for residential, commercial, and land properties
- Selling without a real estate agent (FSBO alternatives)
- Selling property as-is in any condition
- State-specific real estate laws, closing costs, and timelines (all 50 states)
- Florida real estate expertise (closing costs, homestead exemption, doc stamps, hurricane damage, insurance crisis)
- FSBO vs cash buyer vs real estate agent comparison
- Property types: residential, commercial, land, multi-family, mobile homes, industrial, retail, farm, mixed-use
- Special situations: divorce, inherited property, foreclosure, tax liens, code violations, probate, tenant issues, fire damage, mold, hurricane damage, hoarder houses, foundation problems, water damage, roof damage, unpermitted work
- Florida market data and quarterly seller reports
- Interactive tools: closing cost calculator, home value estimator

## Property Types We Buy
- Single-family homes
- Condominiums and townhouses
- Multi-family properties (duplexes to apartment complexes)
- Commercial properties (office, retail, medical, restaurant)
- Vacant land (residential lots, commercial parcels, agricultural acreage)
- Mobile and manufactured homes
- Industrial properties (warehouses, factories, flex space)
- Farm and ranch properties
- Mixed-use buildings
- Retail storefronts and shopping centers

## Page Categories
- /: Homepage - sell your property fast for cash, all types accepted
- /cash-offer.html: Primary conversion page - get a free cash offer
- /how-it-works.html: 3-step cash sale process
- /how-we-price.html: Transparent offer pricing formula (ARV methodology)
- /compare-options.html: Agent vs FSBO vs Cash Buyer comparison
- /cash-buyers-comparison.html: Best cash home buyers in Florida comparison
- /categories.html: All property types we purchase
- /faq.html: 25+ Q&A covering process, pricing, law, situations
- /closing-cost-calculator.html: Interactive Florida closing cost calculator
- /home-value-estimator.html: Property value estimation guide
- /florida-market-report.html: Quarterly Florida home seller market report with county data
- /about.html: Company info, founder bio, E-E-A-T signals
- /contact.html: Contact form, phone, email
- /cities/: 122 Florida city pages with local market data
- /counties/: All 67 Florida county pages
- /neighborhoods/: 40 neighborhood-level pages in major metros
- /states/: All 50 US state pages with state-specific laws and market data
- /guides/: 12 expert seller guides (FSBO, as-is, fast sale, divorce, probate, etc.)
- /situations/: 15 situation-specific pages (fire, mold, hurricane, hoarder, foreclosure, etc.)
- /case-studies/: 8 real property purchase success stories
- /blog/: 24+ blog posts on FL market trends, insurance, taxes, and selling tips
